listitem.para: The current object. At output, the object is updated with the new settings.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: The startup method must be used before any element can be computed, that is, the "startup" method must be called once before the "next method. The startup method cannot be called more than once in the lifetime of the object. If the sequence is to be reset, the "reset" method may be used.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: In the following example, one creates a Halton sequence in dimension 3. The startup is performed first, and the elements of the sequence can then be computed with the "next" method.
